sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ يَوْمِيًّا مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Jesti povrće i voće svakodnevno je veoma važno za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits daily is very important for the body.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ تَحْمِينَا مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Ova hrana sadrži vitamine koji nas štite od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: These foods contain vitamins that protect us from diseases.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ تَجَنُّبَ أَكْلِ السُّكَّرِ الْكَثِيرِ وَالْوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pokušavam izbjegavati previše šećera i brzu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: I try to avoid eating too much sugar and fast food.

sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ يُسَاعِدُ أَيْضًا فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje mnogo vode također pomaže u očuvanju općeg zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking plenty of water also helps in maintaining general health.
